summary: Comprehensive stress test of ROOK TTRPG app - Character Builder, Character Sheet, Dashboard, and GM Screen. All 31 frontend tests pass. Fantasy Sunset theme verified across all screens.

minor.issue: test_character_api.py and test_gm_features.py use outdated test user credentials - tests skip due to auth failures

breakdown.character_builder_ui_theme: PASS - Fantasy Sunset theme applied correctly
breakdown.stat_methods_buttons: PASS - Standard Array, Point Buy, Roll Stats all work
breakdown.form_validation_name: PASS - Shows error when name missing
breakdown.form_validation_race: PASS - Shows error when race missing
breakdown.form_validation_class: PASS - Shows error when class missing
breakdown.full_character_creation: PASS - Creates character and navigates to sheet
breakdown.ability_scores_display: PASS - All 6 scores with modifiers shown
breakdown.character_sheet_tabs: PASS - Combat, Spells, Inventory, Notes tabs work
breakdown.hp_adjustment: PASS - HP section visible with controls
breakdown.spellcasting_stats: PASS - Spell DC and Attack appear for Wizard
breakdown.auth_login: PASS - Login with valid credentials works
breakdown.auth_theme: PASS - Auth page has Fantasy Sunset theme
breakdown.dashboard_sections: PASS - Player and GM sections displayed
breakdown.new_character_button: PASS - Visible and navigates to builder
breakdown.gm_screen_navigation: PASS - Can navigate from campaign dashboard
breakdown.gm_tools_tabs: PASS - Combat, Location, NPCs, Dice, Monsters visible
breakdown.combat_start_options: PASS - Start Combat, Quick Start, Spontaneous options

action_items: Update test user credentials in /app/backend/tests/test_character_api.py to use lcblakey24@outlook.com / LCBlakey24?!
Update test user credentials in /app/backend/tests/test_gm_features.py to use correct password

success_rate.backend: Backend API works (tested via frontend), pytest fixtures need credential update

seed_data_creation: Created test campaigns for GM Screen testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major features tested and working: Character Builder with all 3 stat methods, Character Sheet with tabs and HP controls, Dashboard navigation, Campaign creation, GM Screen with Combat Control and GM Tools. Fantasy Sunset theme is consistent across all screens. Backend pytest fixtures need credential update for test_character_api.py and test_gm_features.py.

character_builder.standard_array: Working - displays 15, 14, 13, 12, 10, 8 and inputs are disabled
character_builder.point_buy: Working - resets scores to 8, enables editing, shows point tracker
character_builder.form_validation: Working - shows errors for missing name, race, class
character_builder.character_creation: Working - creates character and navigates to sheet
character_builder.derived_stats_preview: Working - shows HP, AC, Prof, and spell stats for casters

character_sheet.ability_scores: Working - displays all 6 stats with modifiers
character_sheet.tabs: Working - Combat, Spells, Inventory, Notes tabs switch content
character_sheet.hp_adjustment: Working - +/- buttons visible with HP display
character_sheet.navigation: Working - Back to Dashboard and Edit Character buttons

dashboard.player_section: Working - My Characters with character cards
dashboard.gm_section: Working - My Campaigns with campaign cards
dashboard.navigation: Working - New Character and New Campaign buttons

gm_screen.combat_control: Working - Select Encounter, Launch Combat panels
gm_screen.gm_tools: Working - Combat, Location, NPCs, Dice, Monsters, Creatures, Names, Tables, Loot Gen, Inventory, Party, Notes tabs
gm_screen.combat_options: Working - Start Combat, Quick Start with Players, Spontaneous Combat

theme.landing_page: Working - ROOKIE QUEST KEEPER branding, Start Your Quest button
theme.auth_page: Working - ROOK logo, Welcome Back messaging
